title: caroxylon littoralis
intro: Caroxylon littoralis, also known as the coastal glasswort or samphire, is a succulent halophyte plant that thrives in coastal areas and is often found in salt marshes. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, to treat various health issues, including high blood pressure, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Caroxylon littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Caroxylon littoralis are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
